sql_array: CREATE TABLE demo_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP, data JSON);
INSERT INTO demo_table VALUES (2, NULL, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, '{"key":"value2"}');
INSERT INTO demo_table VALUES (3, 'test3', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, NULL);
SELECT id, name || ' updated' AS name_updated FROM demo_table WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT name, (data->'key')::text || ' processed' AS processed_data FROM demo_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM demo_table WHERE created_at < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '1 day');
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT id, name || '_' || created_at FROM demo_table GROUP BY id, name, created_at HAVING COUNT(name) > 1) AS subquery GROUP BY id;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, name || ' clone' AS cloned_name FROM demo_table WHERE name IS NOT NULL;
SELECT REPL_INIT_COPY('demo-srv', 'demo_publication', 0) AS copy_status FROM dual WHERE EXISTS (SELECT * FROM demo_table WHERE name IS NOT NULL);
SELECT id, name, (UPDATE demo_table SET name = name || ' modified' WHERE id = 3 RETURNING name) AS updated_name FROM demo_table WHERE id = 3;
